signals.title: Pace of global warming has nearly doubled since 2015 — acceleration confirmed
signals.summary: New study confirms global warming pace has almost doubled since 2015, driven by compound heat-drought extremes. Heatwaves surging compound drought events. Acceleration exceeds prior IPCC models.

signals.title: Middle East War Day 7 — UN warns world economy at grave risk; situation could spiral
signals.summary: Day 7 of Middle East war. UN Secretary-General warns of grave risk to world economy. Satellite imagery of Iran attacks paused. Oil and chip supply chains under severe stress.

signals.title: Iran war threatens global chip supplies and AI expansion
signals.summary: Middle East conflict putting global chip supplies at risk. Energy infrastructure critical to semiconductor fabs threatened. AI expansion plans globally contingent on stable chip supply.

signals.title: Anthropic Pentagon deal collapse — AI safety vs defense procurement crossroads
signals.summary: Anthropic Pentagon deal labeled as defense supply chain contractor, triggering backlash and legal challenge. Microsoft, Google, Amazon clarify Claude remains available to non-defense customers.

signals.title: China 15th Five-Year Plan — major climate change implications detailed
signals.summary: Analysis of China 15th Five-Year Plan for climate. Sets targets for renewable energy transition, carbon intensity reduction, and coal phase-out.

signals.title: Global child social media ban wave — India, Indonesia, multiple countries restrict under-16s
signals.summary: Multiple countries simultaneously moving to ban social media for children under 16. India Karnataka, Indonesia outlining legislation. Follows Australia ban.

signals.title: Quantum computing commercialization — Pasqal plans $2B SPAC listing
signals.summary: French quantum startup Pasqal plans $2B SPAC listing, promising national sovereignty. Signals quantum commercialization acceleration and European tech sovereignty push.

signals.title: TerraPower nuclear reactor approved — advanced nuclear gets regulatory green light
signals.summary: Bill Gates TerraPower receives regulatory approval to build new advanced nuclear reactor. Marks major milestone for 4th-generation nuclear power commercialization in US.

signals.title: Anthropic Claude finds 22 Firefox vulnerabilities — AI-powered security research enters production
signals.summary: Anthropic Claude found 22 security vulnerabilities in Firefox over two weeks. First major real-world demonstration of LLM-driven autonomous security research at scale.

signals.title: Pentagon AI surveillance — can DoD legally surveil Americans with AI?
signals.summary: MIT Technology Review investigates legality of Pentagon deploying AI to surveil American citizens. Raises constitutional questions about DoD domestic surveillance authorities as AI capabilities scale.

signals.title: Iran internet freedom deteriorates — authoritarian digital control escalates during war
signals.summary: Iran war creates new uncertainty for Iranian internet. Government likely to increase surveillance, filtering, and shutdowns. Deepening split between authoritarian and open internet globally.

signals.title: AI companies race to war erodes safety commitments — structural governance failure
signals.summary: When AI companies compete for government contracts, safety principles get abandoned. Race dynamics force companies to deprioritize safety commitments. Structural problem for AI governance.

signals.title: Hacking security cameras normalized in warfare — Ukraine/Iran cyber-physical playbook
signals.summary: Ukraine and Iran conflicts establishing hacking security cameras as standard warfare playbook. Cyber-physical attack integration normalizing. Critical infrastructure vulnerability escalating globally.

signals.title: NASA Exploration Upper Stage cancelled — US deep space program restructuring
signals.summary: NASA Exploration Upper Stage (EUS) cancelled. Deep space program restructuring. Gateway lunar station likely gone. SpaceX launch prices rising.

signals.title: Tech employment worse than 2008 or 2020 recessions — AI structural displacement confirmed
signals.summary: Tech employment data shows current downturn significantly worse than 2008 financial crisis or 2020 COVID recession. Structural displacement from AI and automation. Affects 2M+ tech workers.

signals.title: Musk fails to block California AI transparency law — AI accountability legal precedent set
signals.summary: Musk fails in legal challenge to block California AI transparency law. xAI must comply with data disclosure requirements. Sets precedent for state-level AI accountability regulation.

signals.title: India PC shipments surpass pandemic peak — emerging market digital inclusion accelerating
signals.summary: India PC shipments surpass pandemic peak, driven by first-time users upgrading from mobile-only. Signals accelerating digital inclusion wave across emerging markets.

signals.title: Apple blocks ByteDance Chinese apps — US-China tech decoupling hardens
signals.summary: Apple blocks ByteDance Chinese apps in US App Store. US-China tech decoupling continues to harden. Cultural and software market fragmentation accelerating.

signals.title: Tech industry in tariff hell — Nintendo sues US government for tariff refund
signals.summary: Nintendo sues US government for tariff refund. Tech industry broadly in tariff crisis with costs being passed to consumers. Trade war impacts hardware supply chains.

signals.title: Kenya Roam AI-enabled EV fleet monitoring — Africa electric mobility leapfrog
signals.summary: Kenya Roam launches first AI-enabled real-time monitoring tool for electric fleets across Africa. Signals leapfrog EV adoption in Africa.

signals.title: US LGBTQI+ child welfare protections rescinded — federal social policy reversal
signals.summary: US rescission of LGBTQI+ placement protections under Titles IV-E and IV-B. Significant rollback of child welfare protections for LGBTQI+ youth in foster care.

signals.title: ITC investigation on laptops/routers — hardware protectionism escalating
signals.summary: ITC investigation launched for certain laptops, routers and gateways. Hardware protectionism escalating as US-China tech decoupling continues.

signals.title: Savage care — ethics of extreme caregiving in aging societies (Aeon)
signals.summary: Aeon essay explores ethical dimensions of extreme caregiving as populations age. Signals emerging moral philosophy crisis in aging societies.

signals.title: TriZetto healthcare breach — 3.4M patient records stolen
signals.summary: TriZetto confirms 3.4 million patient health and personal records stolen. Healthcare sector cybersecurity crisis deepening.

signals.title: Robot hand with artificial muscles — bioinspired robotics milestone
signals.summary: Robot hand with artificial muscles and tendons achieving human-like dexterity. Bioinspired robotics milestone with implications for prosthetics and physical AI agents.
